# Syed Mohamad Arif - Frontend & Mobile Developer

> Full portfolio details for Syed Mohamad Arif, a Frontend & Mobile Developer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Creator of Hikayat Daily Global app on Google Play Store. 4+ years of experience building high-performance mobile apps with React Native, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

Website: https://syedmohamadarif.site

---

## About

Syed Mohamad Arif is a dedicated Frontend Developer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia with 4+ years of experience specializing in React Native for mobile apps and React for web platforms. He works across the full product lifecycle, from UI/UX design and prototyping to development, testing, and deployment. Skilled in Git, CI/CD, and Agile practices, he builds scalable features that enhance user experience and business value. With a strong eye for design and proficiency in Figma and Adobe tools, he bridges the gap between design and engineering to deliver intuitive interfaces.

---

## Skills & Technologies

### Languages
JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, SQL, Swift, Java/Kotlin

### Frameworks
React Native, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Redux, React Query

### Tools
Android Studio, Xcode, VS Code, Figma, Postman, Maestro

### Databases
PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase

---

## Work Experience

### Mobile App Developer @ Paywatch Malaysia (Feb 2025 - Present)
- Build and enhance key features such as health insurance, critical illness insurance, QR payments, and voucher systems
- Work closely with UI/UX designers to translate designs into smooth, user-friendly components
- Manage TestFlight and Firebase App Distribution for testing and releases
- Support CI/CD processes through Azure Pipeline to ensure efficient builds and deployments
- Technologies: React Native, TypeScript, Firebase, Azure DevOps, Maestro

### Junior Mobile App Developer @ Zonar Malaysia (Sep 2023 - Jan 2025)
- Specialize in React Native development using Firebase, Redux, and React Navigation
- Responsible for designing the UI/UX of the Zonar app, ensuring user-friendly functionality
- Work across the full project lifecycle using insights from Google Analytics
- Follow Agile sprints with regular scrum meetings to track progress
- Technologies: React Native, Firebase, Redux, Figma, Google Analytics

### Junior Mobile App Developer @ Accenture (Aug 2022 - Sep 2023)
- Maintain, enhance, and build new features for the Unifi mobile prepaid (TM) app
- Integrate RESTful APIs and manage state with Redux
- Implement OneSignal for push notifications
- Use Git for efficient version control and team collaboration
- Technologies: React Native, Redux, RESTful APIs, OneSignal, Git

---

## Featured Projects

### Hikayat Daily Global (Mobile Application - Live on Play Store)
A live mobile application showcasing end-to-end mobile development skills from UI/UX design to deployment. Built with React Native and modern mobile development practices, demonstrating expertise in delivering production-ready, user-friendly applications.
- Technologies: React Native, TypeScript, Firebase, Redux
- Platform: Android
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hikayatdailyglobal&hl=en

### CitySage (Web Application)
A city guide web application providing smart insights and recommendations for urban exploration.
- Technologies: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Live: https://syedmhdarif.github.io/citysage-web-project/

### Interactive Room (3D Web Experience)
An interactive 3D portfolio world built with Three.js, featuring explorable environments and immersive navigation.
- Technologies: Three.js, React, 3D, WebGL
- Live: https://interactive-room-wine.vercel.app/

### Hikayat Diri (Web Application)
A personal storytelling web app that brings narratives to life with a clean, elegant reading experience.
- Technologies: React, TypeScript, Vercel
- Live: https://hikayat-diri-web.vercel.app/
